issue_1_regime_matrix.note: Volatile expanded from 3 to 6 strategies; filter_intents_by_regime invoked on both IBKR and Kraken lanes after _build_plan_and_intents. Fail-open on any error.

issue_3_kraken_gate.root_cause: is_kraken_gate_enabled() called getattr(decision, 'kraken_enabled', None) but LiveGateDecision holds kraken_enabled at decision.context.execution.kraken_enabled — always None -> fell through to env var KRAKEN_ENABLED which is unset in prod -> returned False.
issue_3_kraken_gate.fix: Read decision.context.execution.kraken_enabled; retain defensive fallbacks; env fallback now defaults True matching _load_execution_config.
issue_3_kraken_gate.verified: is_kraken_gate_enabled() returns True in current env; LiveGate paper_kraken mode remains; no live orders possible (CHAD_KRAKEN_MODE=paper_kraken).

issue_4_bar_1m.age_at_audit: ~17 hours, crossed market open (13:30 UTC) with no writes
issue_4_bar_1m.action_taken: documented only — CLAUDE.md rule 7 prohibits restarting live services without explicit operator instruction
issue_4_bar_1m.recommended_operator_step: systemctl restart chad-ibkr-bar-provider and monitor journalctl -fu chad-ibkr-bar-provider during market hours

issue_5_allocator_v3.root_cause: not_a_threshold_problem: threshold already essentially zero. base_weights upstream only includes alpha_futures (other strategies have base_weight=0). alpha_futures has per_strategy.var=0 because its active-minute returns grid is degenerate.
issue_5_allocator_v3.action_taken: no_code_change — documented as data/upstream issue. Lowering the threshold would not help. Will resolve when more strategies accumulate non-degenerate returns in brain_returns_1m_active.ndjson.
issue_5_allocator_v3.remaining: investigate why runtime/allocator_v3_state.json has not been refreshed since 2026-04-02; confirm who publishes it (likely orchestrator or a timer job)

issue_6_strategy_health_filter.change: Added EXCLUDED_FROM_HEALTH frozenset + _is_excluded_strategy() helper; compute_all() skips excluded names. Prefix match on 'reconciled_phase2*' covers future timestamp variants.

issue_7_signal_decay_tz.root_cause: _parse_date passed ISO strings without tz through datetime.fromisoformat() which returns naive objects. Comparing those to the YYYY-MM-DD path (which always attaches UTC) raised TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes inside _find_entry_bar_index.
issue_7_signal_decay_tz.fix: Force the ISO branch to UTC when tzinfo is None before returning.

issue_8_stale_bar_warning.behavior: emits STALE_BARS logger.warning once per symbol per process when age > 5 days; still returns the bar so shadow evaluation continues
issue_8_stale_bar_warning.smoke_tested: IWM triggered warning at age_days=20 (last bar 2026-04-02)

tests.failing_tests_root_cause: IB Gateway client_id=99 already in use — tests try to connect to a running live IB session and time out. Verified pre-existing by running the test suite on a clean stash of main with my changes reverted; same 3 tests fail.

remaining_issues: Issue 4: chad-ibkr-bar-provider is running but not writing bars today — operator must restart (CLAUDE.md rule 7 blocks me from doing it).
Issue 5: runtime/allocator_v3_state.json is 20 days stale; investigate why the state publisher has stopped running.
IB Gateway client_id=99 conflict breaking 3 position_guard tests — pre-existing, infrastructure-level, not caused by this pass.
